allow: PowerShell(Start-Process "http://localhost:3000/ui_kits/marketing/products.html"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Start-Process "http://localhost:3000/ui_kits/marketing/solutions.html"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Start-Process "http://localhost:3000/ui_kits/marketing/about.html"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Start-Process "http://localhost:3000/ui_kits/marketing/contact.html")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\project\\Kitotech Design System\\scraps\\screenshot.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "done")

PowerShell(Start-Process "http://localhost:3000/ui_kits/marketing/index.html"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\project\\Kitotech Design System\\scraps\\screenshot.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "done")
